This is a source-linked research archive for graphic design and visual communication records. It organizes records through folders/topology: France, Midcentury modern graphic communication, Graphic design object record, Unresolved region, Modern typography and layout, World War and public-information graphics. Surface types in the packet: sheet. Publication roles in the packet: main_sheet.
